\tzpentry{ID3519}{Bridge Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3519 introduces Bridge Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ H_{\text{bridge}} = \hbar \epsilon(t)\big(c^\dagger + c\big) + \hbar g_a (a^\dagger c + c^\dagger a) + \hbar g_b (b^\dagger c + c^\dagger b), \]
